====Pokémon==== {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Molayne |width=74 |pkmn=Dugtrio |type1=Ground |type2=Steel |img=Molayne Dugtrio Adventures.png |epnum=PASM19 |epname=Truth and the Mastermind Behind Team Skull |desc=This {{rf|Alolan}} {{p|Dugtrio}} is Molayne's only known Pokémon. It was first seen with its Trainer watching people be evacuated to [[Hokulani Observatory]]. It later fought against a {{p|Celesteela}} and {{p|Guzzlord}} to prevent them from attacking Hokulani Observatory, but was defeated. Later, it fought an {{tc|Aether Foundation Employee}}'s {{p|Nihilego}} and won with the help of a [[Z-Move]]. None of Dugtrio's moves are known.{{tt|*|Dugtrio is implied to know a Steel-type attack due to the use of Corkscrew Crash}}
Dugtrio can also perform the [[Z-Move]] {{m|Corkscrew Crash}}.}}
